title: Beggar on Horseback
writer: Marc Connelly, George S. Kaufman, Walter Woods
actors: Edward Everett Horton, Esther Ralston, Erwin Connelly
plot: Impoverished composer Neil McRae loves Cynthia Mason, but fearing poverty, he proposes to wealthy Gladys Cady. One night he dozes in an armchair and has a nightmare of a wedding to and life with Gladys: In robe and top hat he's sw...
